message:
feat(docs): Add comprehensive API documentation

- Create OpenAPI 3.0.3 specification in public/openapi.json
- Add /docs/api page with full API reference documentation
- Create DocsPageLayout component with sidebar navigation
- Create CodeBlock and CodeTabs components for code examples
- Document all public endpoints: prompts, skills, share, health
- Include curl, JavaScript, and Python code examples
- Document error handling, rate limits, and caching patterns

Implements jeffreysprompts.com-t524

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,527 @@ +import type { Metadata } from "next"; +import { DocsPageLayout } from "@/components/docs/DocsPageLayout"; +import { CodeBlock, CodeTabs } from "@/components/docs/CodeBlock"; + +export const metadata: Metadata = { + title: "API Documentation | JeffreysPrompts", + description: "Complete API reference for JeffreysPrompts.com. Learn how to programmatically access prompts, download skills, and integrate with your tools.", +}; + +const tableOfContents = [ + { id: "introduction", title: "Introduction" }, + { id: "base-url", title: "Base URL", level: 2 }, + { id: "authentication", title: "Authentication" }, + { id: "prompts", title: "Prompts" }, + { id: "get-prompts", title: "List Prompts", level: 2 }, + { id: "skills", title: "Skills" }, + { id: "get-skill", title: "Download Skill", level: 2 }, + { id: "share", title: "Share Links" }, + { id: "create-share", title: "Create Share Link", level: 2 }, + { id: "get-share", title: "Access Shared Content", level: 2 }, + { id: "health", title: "Health Endpoints" }, + { id: "errors", title: "Error Handling" }, + { id: "rate-limits", title: "Rate Limits" }, +]; + +export default function ApiDocsPage() { + return ( + + {/* Introduction */} +
+

Introduction

+

+ The JeffreysPrompts API provides programmatic access to the prompt registry, + skill downloads, and platform features. It's designed for: +

+
    +
  • CLI Tools - The jfp CLI uses this API
    • +
  • Integrations - Build tools that work with JeffreysPrompts
    • +
  • Automation - Script prompt management workflows
    • +
+ +

Base URL

+

All API requests should be made to:

+ +
+ + {/* Authentication */} +
+

Authentication

+

+ Public endpoints (prompts, skills, health) require no authentication. + Premium features require authentication via the CLI login flow. +

+ +

Public Endpoints (No Auth Required)

+
    +
  • GET /prompts - List all prompts
    • +
  • GET /skills/:id - Download skill files
    • +
  • GET /health/* - Health checks
    • +
+ +

Premium Endpoints (Auth Required)

+

+ For premium features, authenticate using the CLI: +

+ +

+ This initiates a device code flow that opens your browser for authentication. + Tokens are stored securely at ~/.config/jfp/credentials.json. +

+
+ + {/* Prompts */} +
+

Prompts

+

+ Access the full prompt registry with filtering and caching support. +

+ +

List Prompts

+

+ GET /prompts +

+

+ Returns all prompts with optional filtering. Supports ETag-based caching + for efficient polling. +

+ +

Query Parameters

+ + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + +
ParameterTypeDescription
categorystringFilter by category (e.g., ideation, automation)
tagstringFilter by tag
featured"true"Only return featured prompts
minimal"true"Return minimal data (id, title, category, tags only)
+ +

Example Request

+ + +

Response

+ + +

Caching

+

+ The API returns an ETag header. Use If-None-Match + to get a 304 Not Modified response when content hasn't changed: +

+ +
+ + {/* Skills */} +
+

Skills

+

+ Download prompts as Claude Code SKILL.md files for direct installation. +

+ +

Download Skill

+

+ GET /skills/:id +

+

+ Returns a SKILL.md file that can be saved directly to your Claude Code + skills directory. +

+ +

Example Request

+ + +

Response

+

+ Returns text/markdown with Content-Disposition header: +

+ + +

Error Response (404)

+ +
+ + {/* Share Links */} +
+

Share Links

+

+ Create shareable links for prompts, bundles, and workflows. +

+ +

Create Share Link

+

+ POST /share +

+ +

Request Body

+ + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + +
FieldTypeRequiredDescription
contentTypestringYesprompt, bundle, workflow, or collection
contentIdstringYesID of the content to share
passwordstringNoOptional password protection (max 64 chars)
expiresInintegerNoDays until expiration (max 365)
+ +

Response

+ + +

Access Shared Content

+

+ GET /share/:code +

+

+ Returns the shared content. If password-protected, returns 401 + with {`{"requiresPassword": true}`}. +

+ +

Response

+ +
+ + {/* Health */} +
+

Health Endpoints

+

+ Monitor service health and readiness. +

+ + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + +
EndpointDescription
GET /healthBasic health check with prompt stats
GET /health/readyKubernetes-style readiness probe
GET /health/statusDetailed status including memory and uptime
+ +

Example: Basic Health Check

+ + +
+ + {/* Error Handling */} +
+

Error Handling

+

+ All errors return JSON with an error field: +

+ + +

HTTP Status Codes

+ + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + +
CodeDescription
200Success
304Not Modified (use cached version)
400Bad Request (invalid parameters or body)
401Unauthorized (auth required or password needed)
404Not Found
409Conflict (e.g., duplicate report)
410Gone (e.g., expired share link)
429Rate Limit Exceeded
+
+ + {/* Rate Limits */} +
+

Rate Limits

+

+ Rate limits apply to certain endpoints to prevent abuse: +

+ + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + +
EndpointLimitWindow
POST /reports10 requests24 hours per IP
POST /support/tickets5 requests24 hours per IP/email
+ +

+ When rate limited, the response includes a Retry-After header + indicating seconds until the limit resets: +

+ +
+ + ); +}
